test_cases.description: Verify the generated B2B Business Agreement shows the correct signatory name and title.
test_cases.expected_result: Signatory name displays as Michael Joe Pamintuan with title Sales Skills Development Manager under Pinoy Travel Biz Group Incorporation / First Party.
test_cases.actual_result: Generated agreement PDF shows 'Michael Joe Pamintuan' with title 'Sales Skills Development Manager' under the First Party block.
test_cases.comments: No discrepancy found between ticket requirement and PDF output.

test_cases.description: Verify the correct signature image/graphic is attached to the Michael Joe Pamintuan signatory block.
test_cases.expected_result: The signature image shown matches Michael Joe Pamintuan's actual signature, not Rachel Ann's or a placeholder.
test_cases.actual_result: First Party signature image displayed matches Michael Joe Pamintuan's actual signature.
test_cases.comments: Signature image renders clearly, no distortion or cropping observed.

test_cases.description: Verify previously generated agreements (created before the fix) are not left showing the old incorrect signatory if reopened/regenerated.
test_cases.expected_result: Old/archived agreements do not retain the incorrect signatory.
test_cases.actual_result: Reopened an agreement generated prior to the fix; signatory shown was the corrected one, no leftover Rachel Ann reference found.
test_cases.comments: Sir MJ to confirm if this needs to be checked again for agreements generated much earlier, outside this test's sample.

test_cases.description: Verify clicking the Send User Agreement Email icon sends the agreement to the email used during partner signup/registration.
test_cases.expected_result: The Business Agreement email is received at the exact email address shown in the Email column (signup-registered email).
test_cases.actual_result: Triggered Send User Agreement Email; confirmation payload and email received showed the correct registered signup email (e.g. corgiqal01@gmail.com matching the Email column).
test_cases.comments: Verified via DevTools Network tab payload, not just UI confirmation modal.

test_cases.description: Verify the emailed agreement (via Send User Agreement Email) reflects the corrected signatory.
test_cases.expected_result: The agreement shows Michael Joe Pamintuan, Sales Skills Development Manager, with his signature.
test_cases.actual_result: Opened the emailed agreement from Send User Agreement Email; signatory shown was Michael Joe Pamintuan with correct signature.
test_cases.comments: Same PDF template used as View Details/download version, consistent formatting.

test_cases.description: Verify clicking Send Agreement to Other Email icon sends the agreement to a manually-entered email address, not the registered signup email.
test_cases.expected_result: The Business Agreement email is received at the manually-input email address only.
test_cases.actual_result: Triggered Send Agreement to Other Email with a manually entered address; confirmation payload and email received showed only the manually input address (e.g. byronpotb@gmail.com), registered email was not cc'd.
test_cases.comments: Verified via DevTools Network tab payload as well.

test_cases.description: Verify the emailed agreement (via Send Agreement to Other Email) reflects the corrected signatory.
test_cases.expected_result: The agreement shows Michael Joe Pamintuan, Sales Skills Development Manager, with his signature.
test_cases.actual_result: Opened the emailed agreement from Send Agreement to Other Email; signatory shown was Michael Joe Pamintuan with correct signature.
test_cases.comments: Consistent with Send User Agreement Email version.

test_cases.description: Verify system prevents sending when the other email field is left blank (Send Agreement to Other Email).
test_cases.expected_result: System blocks the send with a validation message requiring an email input; no email is dispatched.
test_cases.actual_result: Left the other-email field blank and attempted to send; system displayed a validation message and blocked the send.
test_cases.comments: Validation message text not explicitly recorded; recommend UX to confirm wording is user-friendly.

test_cases.description: Verify triggering one send icon does not affect or trigger the other, and both can be used in sequence without errors.
test_cases.expected_result: Both actions complete independently and correctly, with no cross-sending or duplication errors.
test_cases.actual_result: Ran Send User Agreement Email followed by Send Agreement to Other Email in sequence; each email arrived only at its intended address with no duplication or cross-sending.
test_cases.comments: No cross-sending or duplicate email issue observed across both actions.
